description_long: This object consists of a rectangular wooden block with two elongated, metallic objects embedded in grooves on its top surface. The longer object appears to be a sword with a straight, dark blade, a gold-colored crossguard, and a matching pommel, while the shorter object resembles a matching dagger or short sword with similar design elements. Both handles are dark, possibly wrapped or lacquered, and feature gold accents at the ends. The wooden block serves as a display or storage base, with precisely carved slots to hold the blades securely. The overall appearance is elegant and refined, with a focus on symmetry and presentation. The materials and finish suggest a decorative or ceremonial purpose rather than utilitarian use.
description: A wooden display block holds a straight-bladed sword and a matching dagger, both with dark handles and gold accents, presented in carved grooves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of both blades and the rectangular wooden block, highlighting the gold accents and the parallel grooves.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the thickness of the wooden block and the alignment of the sword and dagger within their grooves.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite sides of the sword and dagger, with gold details still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the block's thickness and the handles of both blades, with the gold pommel and guard more prominent.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark, possibly lacquered with gold pommel and guard accents
attribute_ornamentation: gold accents on guard and pommel
